background: The case-control study on esophageal cancer and alcohol use also collected data on tobacco use as a potential risk factor. Table 18.30 shows data from the study with tobacco use dichotomized at 20 grams/day.

task.query: Calculate the odds ratio for the data provided.
Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the odds ratio.
Interpret the results of the odds ratio and confidence interval.
task.answer: The point estimate suggests that there is 96% increase in risk associated with this level of tobacco use.
